summary: Iteration 3 e2e regression after question bank expansion (M1:102, M2/M3/M4:101 = 405 total) and Navbar added to Results page. Backend: all 12 pytest tests pass (100%) against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL - subjects list bilingual, /api/quiz/start/M1..M4 each return exactly 20 bilingual questions, /api/quiz/start/MOCK returns 50, lowercase code works, invalid -> 404, submit/review bilingual with explanation_en+explanation_hi. Frontend: home-page loads with 4 subject cards and '100+' stats badge; M1 flow (answer -> jump to quiz-jump-19 -> answer -> quiz-submit-btn -> quiz-confirm-modal -> quiz-confirm-submit) lands on results-page; main-navbar renders at top of Results; 'Your Result' sub-header + retry button present; nav-lang-toggle on Results switches content EN<->HI (e.g. 'Your Result' -> 'परिणाम'); nav-theme-toggle flips 'dark' class on <html>; results-share-whatsapp-btn calls window.open with wa.me url; nav-home-link navigates back to /; nav-history-btn from Results lands on /history and shows the new attempt.
critical_code_review_comments: Results.jsx retry/back-home buttons are duplicated by nav-home-link in Navbar; consider removing 'results-back-home-btn' bottom button to simplify.

Question pool sizes are 102/101/101/101; if UI claims '100+', this matches, but a future plan for 200+ should keep pool assembly lazy (currently all modules import at startup - fine for current size).
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') - prefer FastAPI lifespan (carried over from iter 2).
No TTL index on quiz_sessions - sessions accumulate forever (carried over from iter 2).
seed_data_creation: None - questions are static in questions_data.py + extras_m*.py + extras_topup.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pool sizes verified at backend import: M1=102, M2=101, M3=101, M4=101. /api/quiz/start/<code> still samples exactly meta['num_questions']=20 (50 for MOCK) so expansion doesn't break existing tests. Navbar is now rendered on Results via <Navbar/> with data-testid='main-navbar'; Results.jsx still exposes results-share-whatsapp-btn, results-back-home-btn, results-page, results-score, filter-*, review-item-*. The 'nav-lang-toggle' button label 'EN | हिं' is a segmented indicator that does not change text when clicked - verify language change by checking page content (e.g. 'Your Result' vs 'परिणाम') or HTML lang attr, not the button text. Flow selectors validated: home-page, subject-card-M1..M4, quiz-page, quiz-option-0..3, quiz-jump-0..19, quiz-submit-btn, quiz-confirm-modal, quiz-confirm-submit, results-page, main-navbar, nav-home-link, nav-lang-toggle, nav-theme-toggle, nav-history-btn(-mobile), nav-mock-test-btn(-mobile), history-page, history-item-*.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All 12 backend tests + all 9 frontend scenarios passed.
